A national bank opened Solana deposits. A government launched a Solana-backed visa.

From privacy vaults to prediction markets to payroll rails, Solana's infrastructure layer is becoming invisible and the products built on it are becoming undeniable.

Here’s what happened over https://t.co/jDgiuHZpOn

result.text:
A national bank opened Solana deposits. A government launched a Solana-backed visa.

From privacy vaults to prediction markets to payroll rails, Solana's infrastructure layer is becoming invisible and the products built on it are becoming undeniable.

Here’s what happened over the week:

📰 Headline News

- @SoFi, the national chartered bank, enabled native Solana network deposits

- @solanapayments launched as a unified hub for Solana payments

- @gmcbhutan launched the first Solana-backed nomad visa

- Solana RWA market cap hit a new ATH of $1.71B

📰 Launches

- @orca_so added PnL and position history to its Liquidity Terminal

- @metaplex introduced the Metaplex App for token discovery and launches

- @mtndao Demo Day featured 30 teams presenting across categories

- @solanamobile debuted @SeekerClaw, enabling less than a minute AI agent deployments

- @IndexifyApp went live on iOS and Android, bringing portfolio tracking to mobile

- @BagsApp introduced the Bags App Store marketplace for developers

- @dflow and @phantom shipped a Claude Code Skill for building Solana apps

- @TradeNeutral unveiled its Debasement Vault designed for monetary neutrality

- @EitherwayAI debuted a describe-to-deploy tool for Solana apps

- @pipenetwork shipped SolanaCDN, an open-source acceleration layer for block delivery

- @printr launched an MCP server enabling AI agents to autonomously deploy and track tokens on Solana

- @Zebec_HQ launched the Zebec SuperApp for USDC-based payroll

- @gauntlet_xyz launched USDC vault on @kamino

- @trytbd released a platform for global polls and prediction markets

- @project0 rolled out 0 Pay, connecting onchain portfolios to IRL payment infrastructure

- @MagicEden transitioned its marketplace focus exclusively on Solana and Packs

- @playdotfunsol released gamified game growth platform for developers and players

- @clawpumptech shipped a V2 upgrade for its agentic gateway

- @glamsystems partnered with @gauntlet_xyz to bring institutional yields to gtUSDa

- @triadmarkets entered its next phase of expansion on Solana

- @reflectmoney introduced Reflect Whitelabel for launching custom yield-bearing stablecoins

- @Noah_HQ partnered with @JupiterExchange to integrate regulated neobank capabilities

- @Solana_Company (NASDAQ: HSDT) announced global high-speed infrastructure buildout plans

- @OnePieceLabs kicked off Solana Bootcamp APAC

- @blueprintAI debuted an AI-driven Smart Savings Account

- @coingecko and @nansen_ai shipped x402-powered APIs, enabling onchain data access for AI agents

📰 Milestones

- @kamino crossed $1B in total RWA market size

- @Sunrise_DeFi hit $360M+ volume and 113K+ wallets since November launch

- @PreStocks total value surpassed $10M

This week's cover art by @foursixsix 🤝

tweets.full_text:
Since early Feb, I've been leading product for the @SolanaFndn.

Solana Foundation Product is a brand new team of world-class engineers and PMs that are building full stack, first party experiences & APIs for Solana.

Our primary user is a large enterprise or fintech, but we're also shipping new experiences for everyday users.

Everything we build is AI-ready, designed for LLMs and agents to consume and use.

We've already launched a few products in stealth or beta and excited to share more about those in March.

The product team is hiring 👇

tweets.full_text:
📰 SOLANA NEWS:

- SoFi Enables Direct Solana Deposits

SoFi has become the first U.S. bank to enable direct deposits on the Solana network.

Allowing its ~13.7 million customers to transfer SOL from external wallets directly into their SoFi crypto accounts.

- Solana Domains Now in Jupiter Wallet

.sol domains are now supported in Jupiter Mobile and its wallet browser extension. You can now send assets by simply typing your .sol domain instead of long addresses.

- SolanaCDN Launch

Pipe Network  launched SolanaCDN

A free, open-source validator client enhancement that integrates a global content delivery layer.

legacy.full_text:
Update on @MagicEden and @DiceyHQ: 

It is clear we're entering a new era where finance and entertainment merge. We are now 2 months into @DiceyHQ’s closed beta and are incredibly bullish on how things have developed (~200 users, >$15M wagered). 

To give Dicey the focus it

result.text:
Update on @MagicEden and @DiceyHQ: 

It is clear we're entering a new era where finance and entertainment merge. We are now 2 months into @DiceyHQ’s closed beta and are incredibly bullish on how things have developed (~200 users, >$15M wagered). 

To give Dicey the focus it deserves, it’s time for us to go all in with the full scope of our talent and resources. Therefore, we are streamlining the Magic Eden marketplace to focus exclusively on Packs and Solana.

With that lens, we are announcing a few changes to our product portfolio:

1// Betting: We are doubling down on @DiceyHQ to innovate in the crypto casino & sportsbetting space to capture the massive opportunity in iGaming.

2// Marketplace & Wallet: We are winding down support for our EVM marketplace (March 9), Bitcoin (Runes & Ordinals) marketplace (March 9), Bitcoin API (March 27), and the Magic Eden Wallet (April 1)

3// NFT Buybacks: We will be winding down NFT buybacks as they had minimal impact, and will instead shift our focus to ecosystem design and product initiatives, including the role future yield efforts towards the $ME token plays in that ecosystem.

4// $ME Token: $ME remains the central token of our ecosystem across Magic Eden and Dicey. As our product suite evolves, including Dicey, we expect $ME to remain an important part of how users engage across all of our products. Right now, our focus is on execution, product-market fit and scaling GTM for Dicey. We'll provide more clarity around $ME's integration into Dicey as the roadmap develops.

Why is there a need to streamline our products? 

The 80/20 rule has become our reality: 80% of our cost are tied to products generating only 20% of our revenue. By winding down these products, we're refocusing on our Solana roots & retaining our most profitable products, betting on deep on crypto entertainment, and positioning our products for long term growth incl. the role of $ME token and our community plays within it.

The future of ME is simpler, faster, and fueled by our original home on Solana and the success of Dicey. 

I can’t wait to share more about what we’re building at Dicey in the coming weeks.

tweets.full_text:
A generational opportunity to reinvent crypto gaming starts here.

With 150k Seeker users on @solana, @solanamobile is the only distribution layer positioned to realise a new vision of fully onchain competitive economies.

Built from first principles, Colony has:
→ Player-controlled production
→ Globally shared markets
→ Real-time economic competition

One unified, high-throughput economy.

In Colony, rewards are native to @solana:
→ SOL
→ SKR
→ Season-limited items
→ $STAR (Stardust), earned only through gameplay and capturing 20% of revenue

Performance settles onchain. Incentives are transparent. Outcomes are verifiable.

The right home for Colony was always @solanamobile. 
→ Direct access to Solana-native users
→ Native wallet integration
→ No rent-seeking duopoly

This is what happens when high-performance infrastructure meets aligned distribution.

Colony launches today, March 2nd 15:00 UTC.

The next era of crypto gaming starts on @solana.

tweets.full_text:
Good morning!

Staying safe and calm in Dubai despite the situation. 

Decided to build more in public and share weekly @NOMADZxyz progress. 

Week 10, 2026

• Product (platform): 

1. Launched custom referral in our referral system (10% in USDC and XP from every booking), next week launching 2nd level referral for communities to get 5% in USDC and XP.

2. Added conference venues to the map so that people can see the exact location on the map and book nearby.

3. Added 5 events to the calendar and 5 badges from the past conferences.

4. Built an interface with an Earth to show the conferences and side events in the events section.

5. Improved AI search districts, breakfasts, and locations based on customer feedback.

• Product (mobile):

1. Build the 9th release of the @solanamobile app with an updated navbar design.

2. Created a new navigation menu

2. Created a new navigation menu, event categories and book nearby features.

4. Improved search logic and started the integration of the AI search.

• Growth:

1. Launched Cohort 1 of Nomadz 100 program with 28 creators on Solana (more than 30 user-generated posts were created in week 1).

2. Partnered up with @MatricaLabs to verify without Wallet Connection (got 75% discount with @MonkeDAO NFT for the enterprise package and commitment for the huge marketing support).

3. Partnered up with @perena to list the third stable coin as a payment option and add their NFT community to Nomadz.

4. Partnered up with @SolanaEvents for Accelerate Miami and wrote a thread with 5 discounted stays at Nomadz.

5. Connected with the @SolanaSensei team to list their community at Nomadz and do a growth campaign.

6. Reached out to 15 web3 events organisers to partner up.

7. Applied to @nitrodotacc accelerator. 

How was your week?
tweets.name: Ivan 🧳

profile_bio.description: CEO at @NOMADZxyz - travel aggregator on @solana • book with crypto and save up to 60% on 1M+ stays

2. Partnered up with @MatricaLabs to verify without Wallet Connection (got 75% discount with @MonkeDAO NFT for the enterprise package and commitment for the huge marketing support).

3. Partnered up with @perena to list the third stable coin as a payment option and add their NFT community to Nomadz.

4. Partnered up with @SolanaEvents for Accelerate Miami and wrote a thread with 5 discounted stays at Nomadz.

5. Connected with the @SolanaSensei team to list their community at Nomadz and do a growth campaign.

6. Reached out to 15 web3 events organisers to partner up.

7. Applied to @nitrodotacc accelerator. 

How was your week?

tweets.full_text:
Jupiter TCG rewards is still live with up to $2M in jupUSD

Here's how to participate:

1. Make $10K worth of swaps using the eligible pairs below
2. Make sure you're on ultra mode or Limit V2
3. Use either @jup_mobile or the official jupiter site.

Some eligible pairs:
- JUP -> JLP for 1 card
- LST -> JUP for 1 card
- JUP -> SOL for 1 card

Cards are earned per $10K Volume

PS: You can only reveal cards and claim rewards when connected via Jupiter Wallet or Jupiter Mobile
